assertions.title: OAuth flow via cursor-agent login

steps.observed: Listed 47 models including auto, composer-2, gpt-5.3-codex-*, opus-4.6, etc.
HTTP 200 with assistant message including reasoning_content

assertions.issues: Health endpoint reports 'unauthenticated' but actual chat flow works because cursor-agent handles auth directly

assertions.title: Auth file detection works cross-platform

steps.observed: cli-config.json exists but contains only user info (email, userId), NO access token

assertions.issues: cli-config.json has user info but NO access token. Proxy /health endpoint shows 'unauthenticated' despite cursor-agent being authenticated via its own mechanism

assertions.title: Auth token extraction from CLI config

steps.observed: Contains authInfo (email, userId, authId) but NO access_token field

assertions.issues: cli-config.json does NOT contain an access token. The token appears to be stored elsewhere (possibly in cursor-agent's own storage, not in ~/.cursor/)

assertions.title: Proxy handles missing auth gracefully
assertions.issues: Cannot test without making cursor-agent unauthenticated, which would break the test environment

frictions.description: cursor-agent is authenticated (cursor-agent models works) but proxy /health shows 'unauthenticated'. The actual chat flow still works because cursor-agent handles auth internally.
frictions.resolution: Proxy may need to query cursor-agent directly for auth status rather than looking for token files

blockers.description: VAL-PROXY-005 requires unauthenticated cursor-agent state to test error handling. Making cursor-agent unauthenticated could break the test environment for other subagents.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A - intentionally not attempting as it could disrupt other workers

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-AUTH-001 - chat flow works), 2 failed (VAL-AUTH-002/003 - proxy cannot detect/extract auth from ~/.cursor/ files), 1 blocked (VAL-PROXY-005 - requires unauthenticated state). cursor-agent is authenticated but stores tokens in its own location, not in ~/.cursor/cli-config.json.
